mapper.insert: insert into scene_scripts ( project_id, scene_id, seq_no, title, action_json, dialogue_json, source_refs_json, validation_status, warnings_json ) values ( #{projectId}, #{sceneId}, #{seqNo}, #{title}, #{actionJson}, #{dialogueJson}, #{sourceRefsJson}, #{validationStatus}, #{warningsJson} ) on duplicate key update seq_no = values(seq_no), title = values(title), action_json = values(action_json), dialogue_json = values(dialogue_json), source_refs_json = values(source_refs_json), validation_status = values(validation_status), warnings_json = values(warnings_json)
mapper.select: select id, project_id, scene_id, seq_no, title, action_json, dialogue_json, source_refs_json, validation_status, warnings_json, created_at, updated_at from scene_scripts where project_id = #{projectId} order by seq_no asc
